description: Supervisor agent for NorthStar Health. Triages incoming questions and, when a question is about marketing (products, customer personas or market performance), delegates it to the marketing specialist over the A2A protocol and returns the specialist's answer. Non-marketing questions are answered directly or declined as out of scope.

skills.name: Request Triage
skills.description: Decide whether an incoming question is a marketing question (products, personas, markets) that should be routed to the marketing specialist.

skills.name: Marketing Delegation
skills.description: Delegate a marketing task to the marketing specialist over A2A, then relay the specialist's grounded answer back to the caller.
